test.name: Manager Login And Open Payroll Periods

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Không có payslip nào để mở detail.
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

test.name: Manager Open First Batch Detail

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Link
kw.doc: Verifies link identified by ``locator`` is found from current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'Payroll Batches' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'Payroll Batches' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Không có batch nào để mở detail.
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

branch.status: Text 'Payroll Batches' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

if.status: Text 'Payroll Batches' did not appear in 10 seconds.

test.status: Text 'Payroll Batches' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c129c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e893a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e869d916] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e86e8313] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e871fe92] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e871a011] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e87192c3] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e8666565] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c3de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c38588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c59d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8956785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e895facc+3a88c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e866532a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8d94b48+46f908] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff9dc65e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff9dd64c48c+2c]

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.name: Manager Open Edit First Benefit If Available

kw.name: Open Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.msg: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c129c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e893a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e869d916] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e86e8313] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e871fe92] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e871a011] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e87192c3] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e8666565] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c3de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c38588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c59d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8956785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e895facc+3a88c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e866532a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8d94b48+46f908] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff9dc65e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff9dd64c48c+2c]
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.status: InvalidSessionIdException: Message: invalid session id; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#invalidsessionidexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c129c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e893a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e869d916] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e86e8313] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e871fe92] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e871a011] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e87192c3] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e8666565] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c3de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c38588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8c59d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8956785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e895facc+3a88c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e866532a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e8d94b48+46f908] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff9dc65e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff9dd64c48c+2c]

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Không có benefit nào để edit.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
